zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Marmion於大約1210年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Robert Marmion30歲，母親Juliane de Vassi31歲。他於1244年2月4日之前與Joan Kilpec結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1291年12月5日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Marmion于大约1210年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Robert Marmion30岁，母亲Juliane de Vassi31岁。他于1244年2月4日之前与Joan Kilpec结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1291年12月5日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Marmion was born about 1210, in Warwickshire, England, his father, Robert Marmion, was 30 and his mother, Juliane de Vassi, was 31. He married Joan Kilpec before 4 February 1244. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 5 December 1291, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Marmion est né environ 1210, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Marmion, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Juliane de Vassi, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Kilpec avant 4 février 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 décembre 1291, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Marmion um 1210 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Marmion 30 und seine Mutter Juliane de Vassi 31. Er hat vor 4. Februar 1244 Joan Kilpec geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Dezember 1291 im Alter von 82 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Marmion è nato il circa 1210 nel Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Marmion, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Juliane de Vassi, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan Kilpec prima del 4 febbraio 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 dicembre 1291, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Marmionが約1210年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Marmionは30歳，母Juliane de Vassiは31歳であった。1244年2月4日以前にJoan Kilpecと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1291年12月5日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Marmion(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Marmion(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliane de Vassi(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1244년 2월 4일 이전 Joan Kilpec(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1291년 12월 5일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Marmion nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Marmion, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Juliane de Vassi, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Kilpec antes 4 de fevereiro de 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1291, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Marmion родился около 1210 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Marmion было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliane de Vassi, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Kilpec перед 4 февраль 1244 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 декабря 1291 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Marmion nació aproximadamente 1210, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Marmion, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Juliane de Vassi, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joan Kilpec antes de 4 de febrero de 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de diciembre de 1291, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
